1.gl: properly, interrogative what? (including how? why? when?); but also exclamation, what! (including how!), or indefinitely what (including whatever, and even relatively, that which); often used with prefixes in various adv
1.kj: how (long, oft, (-soever)), (no-) thing, what (end, good, purpose, thing), whereby(-fore, -in, -to, -with), (for) why.
1.dv: or מַה; or מָ; or מַ; also מֶה; a primitive particle;

1.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts
1.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

1.gl: to murmur (in pleasure or anger); by implication, to ponder
1.kj: imagine, meditate, mourn, mutter, roar, [idiom] sore, speak, study, talk, utter.

1.gl: emptiness; figuratively, a worthless thing; adverbially, in vain
1.kj: empty, to no purpose, (in) vain (thing), vanity.

1.dv: or לְאוֹם; from an unused root meaning to gather;

2.gl: to set (literally or figuratively); intensively, to found; reflexively, to sit down together, i.e. settle, consult
2.kj: appoint, take counsel, establish, (lay the, lay for a) found(-ation), instruct, lay, ordain, set, [idiom] sure.

2.gl: to place (any thing so as to stay); reflexively, to station, offer, continue
2.kj: present selves, remaining, resort, set (selves), (be able to, can, with-) stand (fast, forth, -ing, still, up).

2.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
2.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
2.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

2.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
2.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

2.gl: anointed; usually a consecrated person (as a king, priest, or saint); specifically, the Messiah

2.kj: alike, at all (once), both, likewise, only, (al-) together, withal.

3.gl: something intwined, i.e. a string, wreath or foliage
3.kj: band, cord, rope, thick bough (branch), wreathen (chain).
3.dv: or עֲבוֹת; or (feminine) עֲבֹתָה; the same as H5687 (עָבֹת);

3.gl: properly, chastisement, i.e. (by implication) a halter; figuratively, restraint
3.dv: also (in plural) feminine מוֹסֵרָה; or מֹסְרָה; from H3256 (יָסַר);

3.gl: to throw out, down or away (literally or figuratively)
3.kj: adventure, cast (away, down, forth, off, out), hurl, pluck, throw.
break (off), burst, draw (away), lift up, pluck (away, off), pull (out), root out.

4.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry
4.kj: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurk

4.gl: the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)
4.dv: dual of an unused singular שָׁמֶה; from an unused root meaning to be lofty;

4.gl: to laugh (in pleasure or detraction); by implication, to play
4.kj: deride, have in derision, laugh, make merry, mock(-er), play, rejoice, (laugh to) scorn, be in (make) sport.

4.gl: to deride; by implication (as if imitating a foreigner) to speak unintelligibly
4.kj: have in derision, laugh (to scorn), mock (on), stammering.

4.gl: the Lord (used as a proper name of God only)

5.gl: perhaps properly, to arrange; but used figuratively (of words), to speak; rarely (in a destructive sense) to subdue
5.kj: answer, appoint, bid, command, commune, declare, destroy, give, name, promise, pronounce, rehearse, say, speak, be spokesman, subdue, talk, teach, tell, think, use (entreaties), ut

5.gl: to tremble inwardly (or palpitate), i.e. (figuratively) be (causative, make) (suddenly) alarmed or agitated; by implication to hasten anxiously
5.kj: be (make) affrighted (afraid, amazed, dismayed, rash), (be, get, make) haste(-n, -y, -ily), (give) speedy(-ily), thrust out, trouble, vex.

5.gl: properly, the nose or nostril; hence, the face, and occasionally a person; also (from the rapid breathing in passion) ire
5.kj: anger(-gry), [phrase] before, countenance, face, [phrase] forebearing, forehead, [phrase] (long-) suffering, nose, nostril, snout, [idiom] worthy, wrath.

5.gl: at that time or place; also as a conjunction, therefore
5.kj: beginning, for, from, hitherto, now, of old, once, since, then, at which time, yet.

6.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
6.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.

6.gl: to pour out, especially a libation, or to cast (metal); by analogy, to anoint aking
6.kj: cover, melt, offer, (cause to) pour (out), set (up).

6.gl: Tsijon (as a permanent capital), a mountain of Jerusalem
6.dv: the same (regularly) as H6725 (צִיּוּן)lemma צִיוּן missing dagesh, corrected to צִיּוּן;

6.gl: a mountain or range of hills (sometimes used figuratively)

6.kj: I, (as for) me, mine, myself, we, [idiom] which, [idiom] who.

7.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
7.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

7.gl: a day (as the warm hours), whether literal (from sunrise to sunset, or from one sunset to the next), or figurative (a space of time defined by an associated term), (often used adverb)
7.kj: age, [phrase] always, [phrase] chronicals, continually(-ance), daily, ((birth-), each, to) day, (now a, two) days (agone), [phrase] elder, [idiom] end, [phrase] evening, [phrase] (
7.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

7.kj: answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

7.gl: to bear young; causatively, to beget; medically, to act as midwife; specifically, to show lineage
7.kj: bear, beget, birth(-day), born, (make to) bring forth (children, young), bring up, calve, child, come, be delivered (of a child), time of delivery, gender, hatch, labour, (do the o

7.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
7.dv: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel

7.gl: properly, to score with a mark as a tally or record, i.e. (by implication) to inscribe, and also to enumerate; intensively, to recount, i.e. celebrate
7.kj: commune, (ac-) count; declare, number, [phrase] penknife, reckon, scribe, shew forth, speak, talk, tell (out), writer.

8.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
8.kj: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver

8.gl: cessation, i.e. an end (especially of the earth); often used adverb, no further; also the ankle (in the dual), as being the extremity of the leg or foot
8.kj: ankle, but (only), end, howbeit, less than nothing, nevertheless (where), no, none (beside), not (any, -withstanding), thing of nought, save(-ing), there, uttermost part, want, wit

8.gl: to inquire; by implication, to request; by extension, to demand
8.kj: ask (counsel, on), beg, borrow, lay to charge, consult, demand, desire, [idiom] earnestly, enquire, [phrase] greet, obtain leave, lend, pray, request, require, [phrase] salute, [id

8.gl: properly, something inherited, i.e. (abstractly) occupancy, or (concretely) an heirloom; generally an estate, patrimony or portion
8.kj: heritage, to inherit, inheritance, possession. Compare H5158 (נַחַל).

8.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts
8.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

8.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
8.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
8.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

9.gl: properly, to spoil (literally, by breaking to pieces); figuratively, to make (or be) good fornothing, i.e. bad (physically, socially or morally)
9.kj: afflict, associate selves (by mistake for H7462 (רָעָה)), break (down, in pieces), [phrase] displease, (be, bring, do) evil (doer, entreat, man), show self friendly (by mistake for

9.gl: something prepared, i.e. any apparatus (as an implement, utensil, dress, vessel or weapon)
9.kj: armour(-bearer), artillery, bag, carriage, [phrase] furnish, furniture, instrument, jewel, that is made of, [idiom] one from another, that which pertaineth, pot, [phrase] psaltery,

9.gl: to mould into a form; especially as apotter; figuratively, to determine (i.e. form a resolution)
9.kj: [idiom] earthen, fashion, form, frame, make(-r), potter, purpose.
9.dv: probably identical with H3334 (יָצַר) (through the squeezing into shape); (compare H3331 (יַצַע));

9.gl: a scion, i.e. (literally) a stick (for punishing, writing, fighting, ruling, walking, etc.) or (figuratively) a clan
9.kj: [idiom] correction, dart, rod, sceptre, staff, tribe.
9.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to branch off;

9.gl: to dash to pieces, or scatter
9.kj: be beaten in sunder, break (in pieces), broken, dash (in pieces), cause to be discharged, dispersed, be overspread, scatter.

9.gl: iron (as cutting); by extension, an iron implement
9.dv: perhaps from the root of H1269 (בִּרְזוֹת);

10.gl: to judge, i.e. pronounce sentence (for or against); by implication, to vindicate or punish; by extenssion, to govern; passively, to litigate (literally or figuratively)
10.kj: [phrase] avenge, [idiom] that condemn, contend, defend, execute (judgment), (be a) judge(-ment), [idiom] needs, plead, reason, rule.

10.gl: to be (causatively, make or act) circumspect and hence, intelligent
10.kj: consider, expert, instruct, prosper, (deal) prudent(-ly), (give) skill(-ful), have good success, teach, (have, make to) understand(-ing), wisdom, (be, behave self, consider, make)

10.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
10.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
10.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

10.gl: to chastise, literally (with blows) or figuratively (with words); hence, to instruct
10.kj: bind, chasten, chastise, correct, instruct, punish, reform, reprove, sore, teach.

10.gl: at this time, whether adverb, conjunction or expletive
10.kj: henceforth, now, straightway, this time, whereas.

11.gl: to work (in any sense); by implication, to serve, till, (causatively) enslave, etc.
11.kj: [idiom] be, keep in bondage, be bondmen, bond-service, compel, do, dress, ear, execute, [phrase] husbandman, keep, labour(-ing man, bring to pass, (cause to, make to) serve(-ing, s

11.gl: properly, to spin round (under the influence of any violent emotion), i.e. usually rejoice, or (as cringing) fear
11.kj: be glad, joy, be joyful, rejoice.
11.dv: or (by permutation) גּוּל; a primitive root;

11.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
11.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

11.gl: fear (also used as infinitive); morally, reverence

11.dv: or (feminine) רְעָדָהxlit rᵉâdâh corrected to rᵉʻâdâh; from H7460 (רָעַד);

12.gl: properly, the nose or nostril; hence, the face, and occasionally a person; also (from the rapid breathing in passion) ire
12.kj: anger(-gry), [phrase] before, countenance, face, [phrase] forebearing, forehead, [phrase] (long-) suffering, nose, nostril, snout, [idiom] worthy, wrath.

12.gl: properly, to wander away, i.e. lose oneself; by implication to perish (causative, destroy)
12.kj: break, destroy(-uction), [phrase] not escape, fail, lose, (cause to, make) perish, spend, [idiom] and surely, take, be undone, [idiom] utterly, be void of, have no way to flee.

12.gl: a road (as trodden); figuratively, a course of life or mode of action, often adverb
12.kj: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).

12.gl: to kiss, literally or figuratively (touch); also (as a mode of attachment), to equip with weapons
12.dv: a primitive root (identical with H5400 (נָשַׂק), through the idea of fastening up; compare H2388 (חָזַק), H2836 (חָשַׁק));

12.gl: to kindle, i.e. consume (by fire or by eating);  to be(-come) brutish
12.kj: be brutish, bring (put, take) away, burn, (cause to) eat (up), feed, heat, kindle, set (on fire), waste.
12.dv: a primitive root; also as denominative from H1198 (בַּעַר)

12.gl: a little or few (often adverbial or compar.)
12.kj: almost (some, very) few(-er, -est), lightly, little (while), (very) small (matter, thing), some, soon, [idiom] very.
